basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) Additional Assistant Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on 15-05-2026 on the official website GSSSB. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 33 years who have a Diploma in Electrical Engineering or equivalent qualification along with basic computer knowledge and adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both are eligible to apply for these Additional Assistant Engineer vacancies. The online application process for GSSSB Additional Assist

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 33 years Age Relaxation: 10 years for PwD (max 43 years); additional for women and reserved categories as per rules (max 45 years).

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Electrical Engineering or equivalent, Basic knowledge of computer application, Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both
qualification.details: Diploma in Electrical Engineering obtained from Technical Examination Board or any of the Universities or Institutions established or incorporated by or under the Central or State Act in India or any other educational institutions recognised as such or declared as deemed to be a University under Section-3 of the University Grants Commission Act, 1956 or equivalent qualification recognised by the Government. Basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

salary_details.details: Rs. 49600 (first 5 years) then Pay Matrix Level-7 Rs. 39900-126600 Per Month

selection_process: Written Test (MCQ CBRT/OMR Part-A and Part-B) Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer (Electrical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer (Electrical) posts is 26 May 2026. Ensure all details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 33 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Additional Assistant Engineer (Electrical) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Diploma in Electrical Engineering or an equivalent qualification recognized by the government, along with basic computer knowledge and adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Additional Assistant Engineer (Electrical) post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Additional Assistant Engineer (Electrical) position announced in this recruitment drive by GSSSB.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the GSSSB recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 400/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories. This fee needs to be paid online during the application process.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Additional Assistant Engineer (Electrical) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 49600 for the first 5 years, followed by Pay Matrix Level-7 which ranges from Rs. 39900 to Rs. 126600 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test (MCQ CBRT/OMR Part-A and Part-B), followed by Document Verification, and finally the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from other states apply for this Gujarat government job?
faq.answer: The notification specifies eligibility for candidates in Gujarat. It is advisable to check the detailed notification for specific state domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for PwD candidates (10 years, max 43 years) and additional relaxation for women and reserved categories as per rules (max 45 years).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can also visit the official GSSSB website.
